title: Cymbalariella baborensis
taxonomy: Cymbalariella baborensis is a species of lichenized fungus in the family Caliciaceae. It belongs to the genus Cymbalariella and is a part of the phylum Ascomycota. The classification of Cymbalariella baborensis is further broken down to the kingdom Fungi and the domain Eukarya. This species is known to be a type of lichen, a symbiotic relationship between fungi and algae or cyanobacteria. The exact classification of Cymbalariella baborensis may vary depending on the source and current research.
uses: Cymbalariella baborensis has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. Its medicinal uses are primarily based on its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Further studies are required to fully understand the medicinal benefits of Cymbalariella baborensis.
